Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy for the ABiT Consulting LinkedIn App

This Privacy Policy explains how ABiT Consulting (Pvt.) Ltd. collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data when you interact with our LinkedIn developer application and related services on abitcons.com.

  • We only process data that is relevant to the LinkedIn features you authorize.
  • We use data to provide authentication, page integrations, publishing, and support.
  • We do not sell or rent personal information.

Quick Facts

What this policy covers.

Effective date April 20, 2026
Data controller ABiT Consulting (Pvt.) Ltd.
Contact mimran@abitcons.com
Public URL https://abitcons.com/privacy-policy/
LinkedIn sign-in Organization pages Business integrations

On this page

1. Scope 2. Information We Collect 3. How We Use Data 4. Legal Bases 5. Sharing 6. Retention 7. Security 8. Your Rights 9. LinkedIn and Third Parties 10. International Transfers 11. Children's Privacy 12. Changes 13. Contact

Need a data request?

To request access, correction, deletion, or to ask questions about this policy, email mimran@abitcons.com.

1. Scope

This Privacy Policy applies to the ABiT Consulting LinkedIn application and related services made available by ABiT Consulting (Pvt.) Ltd. through LinkedIn and abitcons.com. It covers personal data we process when you sign in with LinkedIn, connect a LinkedIn company page, manage content, use an integration feature, or contact us about the app.

If you use LinkedIn to access the app, LinkedIn's own privacy practices also apply to your use of LinkedIn services.

2. Information We Collect

Depending on the permissions you grant and the features you use, we may collect the following categories of information:

Profile and account data

Your name, LinkedIn member identifier, profile image, public profile URL, and business email address where available or provided by you.

Organization and page data

Company page identifiers, page name, administrator relationship, selected page metadata, and content information needed to support approved integrations.

Content and workflow data

Drafts, post metadata, scheduling details, and related content that you choose to create, review, approve, or publish through the app.

Technical and support data

IP address, device and browser details, timestamps, error logs, audit events, and communications you send to us for support or compliance purposes.

We only request and use data that is reasonably necessary for the LinkedIn features and services you choose to use.

3. How We Use Data

  • To authenticate users and maintain secure access to the app.
  • To connect, administer, and operate approved LinkedIn company page workflows.
  • To create, schedule, publish, or analyze content that you request us to process.
  • To provide technical support, respond to inquiries, and troubleshoot issues.
  • To protect the app, investigate misuse, and maintain security logs.
  • To meet legal, contractual, and platform compliance requirements.

4. Legal Bases for Processing

Where applicable law requires a legal basis, we rely on one or more of the following:

  • Your consent, including permissions you grant through LinkedIn.
  • The performance of a contract or requested business service.
  • Our legitimate interests in operating, securing, and improving the app.
  • Compliance with legal obligations and enforcement requirements.

5. How We Share Information

We do not sell or rent personal data. We may share information only in the following circumstances:

  • With service providers that host, secure, or support the app under confidentiality obligations.
  • With internal personnel and contractors who need access to operate the requested service.
  • When required by law, regulation, court order, or valid governmental request.
  • To protect the rights, safety, security, and integrity of ABiT Consulting, users, or third parties.
  • As part of a merger, acquisition, or business reorganization, subject to appropriate safeguards.

6. Data Retention

We retain personal data only for as long as needed to provide the app, maintain authorized integrations, resolve disputes, keep appropriate business records, and satisfy legal or security obligations.

  • LinkedIn connection and app configuration records are retained while the integration remains active.
  • Operational logs and security records may be retained for a limited period after use ends.
  • We may delete or anonymize data sooner where feasible and appropriate.

7. Security

We use reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards designed to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, disclosure, or alteration. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.

8. Your Rights and Choices

Subject to applicable law, you may have the right to:

  • Request access to the personal data we hold about you.
  • Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
  • Request deletion of data that is no longer necessary for the purposes described above.
  • Object to or restrict certain types of processing.
  • Withdraw consent for LinkedIn permissions by disconnecting the app in LinkedIn settings.

To make a privacy request, email mimran@abitcons.com. We may need to verify your identity before processing certain requests.

9. LinkedIn and Third-Party Services

This app operates with LinkedIn platform services. Your use of LinkedIn is also governed by LinkedIn's terms and privacy notice. We may also use third-party hosting, infrastructure, monitoring, and communication providers that help us operate the app.

You can review LinkedIn's privacy information here: LinkedIn Privacy Policy.

10. International Transfers

Depending on where you access the app and where our service providers operate, personal data may be processed in countries other than your own. Where required, we take reasonable steps to implement appropriate safeguards for such transfers.

11. Children's Privacy

The ABiT Consulting LinkedIn app is intended for business and professional use and is not directed to children. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

12. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect operational, legal, or platform changes. When we do, we will publish the updated version on this page and revise the effective date above.

13. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data handling practices, contact:

ABiT Consulting (Pvt.) Ltd.

Head Office 116 Block F1, Johar Town, Lahore 54000, Pakistan

Privacy Contact

Email: mimran@abitcons.com
Phone: +92 331 3133999
